# `fixtures/` — test PDFs

Synthetic discharge documents used by the integration and stress
suites. All fixtures are fictional — no real patient data.

## Primary 8-case suite (hallucination gate)

Used by `test_integration_hallucination.py`.

| File                                        | Scenario                                          |
|---------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------|
| `chf_narrative.pdf`                         | Heart failure, prose-heavy discharge              |
| `copd_mixed_route_change.pdf`               | COPD with IV→PO route change                      |
| `t2_diabetes_structured.pdf`                | Type 2 diabetes, structured template              |
| `hip_replacement_8pages_distractors.pdf`    | Hip replacement, 8 pages with distractor sections |
| `pneumonia_abbreviations.pdf`               | Pneumonia, abbreviation-heavy                     |
| `minimal_sparse.pdf`                        | Sparse UTI discharge (partial-document stress)    |
| `aki_6_secondaries.pdf`                     | AKI with 6 secondary diagnoses                    |
| `pediatric_asthma_weight_based.pdf`         | Pediatric asthma, weight-based dosing             |

## Stress suite (format-diversity probe)

Used by `run_stress_fixtures.py`. Generated by
`generate_stress_fixtures.py` at the repo root.

| File                                 | Scenario                                       |
|--------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------|
| `fixture_09_epic_chf.pdf`            | Epic AVS-style structured one-pager            |
| `fixture_10_cerner_pneumonia.pdf`    | Cerner narrative, dense prose                  |
| `fixture_11_word_knee.pdf`           | Word-to-PDF community hospital format          |
| `fixture_12_twocolumn_mi.pdf`        | Two-column platypus layout                     |
| `fixture_13_pediatric_appy.pdf`      | Pediatric, parent-directed letter              |
| `fixture_14_multipage_sepsis.pdf`    | 6-page multi-section with distractor pages     |

## Regenerating

```bash
python generate_stress_fixtures.py   # regenerates fixture_09…14
```

The primary 8-case fixtures are checked in as binary and not regenerated
automatically — replace only via a reviewed commit.
